design_philosophy: Eco-Minimalism. Clean, Apple-style premium interface with a focus on sustainability, reducing food waste, and intuitive meal planning. High-contrast legibility, generous white space, soft pill-shaped edges, and liquid glass interactions.

icons.style: Minimalist, stroke-based, no filled icons unless representing an active tab.

screens.welcome: Apple-style hero layout. Top: App Logo & minimal food illustration. Bottom: 'I am a Student' and 'I am an Admin' large primary/secondary CTA buttons.
screens.login_student: Clean Apple-style form. Title 1: 'Welcome Back'. Inputs: Mobile, Password. Large primary CTA.
screens.register_student: Scrollable form with Title 1. Inputs: Full Name, Mobile, Hostel, Room No, Password, Confirm Password. Subdued block for OTP placeholder.
screens.pending_approval: Centered layout with warning/pending icon. 'Account under review' message. Subtle soft-yellow badge.
screens.blocked: Centered layout with danger icon. 'Account Blocked' message. Red danger badge.

student_tabs.home: Today's Plan. Large ON/OFF toggle card for upcoming meals. Tappable chips for preferences.
student_tabs.menu: Grid/List of days. Tappable chips for multi-select preferences (e.g., Idly, Dosa).

admin_tabs.students_status: List of students with Pending/Approved/Blocked badges. Swipe-to-action rows.
admin_tabs.dashboard: Bento grid layout. Key metrics (Eating count, pending approvals, cook qty).
admin_tabs.wastage_calc: Data entry forms for daily leftover food. Calculation cards for loss and savings.
admin_tabs.info: List of important notices or rules.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements MUST include a 'testID' (React Native) or 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., testID='student-login-button').

images.description: Minimal healthy food bowl, perfect for the Welcome screen hero visual.
